case_title: CHAN, MICHAEL vs. BOSSUYT, LUC et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-24-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-24-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-10-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-24-1996 TO NOV-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MICHAEL
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MICHAEL

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSUYT, LUC BOSSUYT, FRANCIS DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-26-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-06-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FOR FILING PROOF OF SERVICE AND FOR COUNSEL TO ADVISE THE COURT AS TO WHAT COURSE TO TAKE IN VIEW OF THE DECEDENT, IN THE FORM OF A DECLARATION. HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-27-1996, OFF CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DATE OF 11/27/96 IS HEREBY VACATED AND SANCTIONS ARE VACATED. (DEPT. 4 WAS NOT NOTIFIED TIMELY OF DISMISSAL) IN THE FUTURE PLEASE DELIVER A CONFORMED COPY OF ANY PAPERS BEING FILED DIRECTLY TO DEPT. 4 IF BEING FILED THE SAME DAY AS A HEARING.
